creator: janprunk@gmail.com
text:
Hello, 

I would like to ask for the inclusion of the BSD User Group for Slovenia on the FreeBSD usergroups website. Here is the information:

1. URL - https://bsdug.wordpress.com/
2. An e-mail contact address of a human in charge - janprunk@gmail.com
3. A short (one paragraph) description of the user group - BSD User Group Slovenia connects BSD system users in Slovenia. Group members also gather on #bsd.si IRC channel on freenode.

Kind regards, 
Jan
